description_long: This is a standard orange traffic cone with a conical body and a wide, square black base for stability. The cone features two broad, white reflective stripes encircling its upper and middle sections, which are slightly scuffed and faded, indicating regular outdoor use. The orange surface of the cone is visibly worn, with dirt marks and some graffiti or marker scribbles present on at least two sides. The base appears to be made of heavy rubber or a similar material, designed to keep the cone upright and resist tipping. The tip of the cone is rounded and solid, matching the orange color of the body, and shows minor surface wear. Overall, the cone exhibits signs of moderate use, with surface grime and faded colors but no major structural damage.
description: A worn orange traffic cone with two white reflective stripes, a square black rubber base, and visible dirt and graffiti markings.
description_view_0: Front view shows the orange cone with two white reflective stripes and prominent graffiti on the lower section.
description_view_1: This side reveals less graffiti, with the reflective stripes and orange surface appearing more faded and dirty.
description_view_2: The cone's surface is mostly clean here, with a visible scuff mark and the reflective stripes intact.
description_view_3: This view highlights additional graffiti on the lower cone, with the stripes and base clearly visible.
attribute_reflective_stripes: Two wide, horizontal white reflective stripes encircle the upper and middle sections of the cone.
attribute_tip_design: The tip is rounded, solid, and orange, with minor surface wear and no attachments.
attribute_base_design: The base is square, flat, and black, made of thick rubber for stability, with a slightly textured surface.
attribute_presence_of_logos_or_markings: Graffiti or marker scribbles are visible on the lower cone in at least two views; no official logos or printed text are present.
attribute_condition: Worn and dirty, with faded colors, visible grime, and graffiti markings but no major structural damage.
